details: The agent navigated to Ada Lovelace's Wikipedia article, found and identified the Charles Babbage link (uid=42_181, url=https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Charles_Babbage), attempted to click it (though the click didn't trigger navigation), then recovered by navigating to the Charles Babbage page using the URL discovered from Ada Lovelace's article. On the Charles Babbage page, the agent correctly found and reported his birth date as 26 December 1791, which matches the known fact.
